title: Remove Operations Manager bio section and replace with gym description

requirements.text: Remove the entire Operations Manager bio section from the homepage (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) including the profile photo, biography text, and phone number display

quotes: the section about me needs removed its horrible
that entire section needs to be about the gym description

acceptanceCriteria: The Operations Manager section with profile photo, biography, and phone number is completely removed from the homepage
No visual remnants of the Operations Manager section remain

requirements.text: Create a small section on the homepage featuring a photo of the user and a brief description focused on the gym's facilities, equipment, and services rather than personal biography

quotes: i wanted a small section and a picture of me
that entire section needs to be about the gym description

acceptanceCriteria: A compact section is added to the homepage with the user's photo
The accompanying text describes the gym's facilities, equipment, services, and what makes Bodyshape Fitness unique
The section is concise and gym-focused rather than biographical

constraints: Do not reuse the random person's photo that was previously displayed
Keep the new section small and concise
Focus content on gym description, not personal biography
nonGoals: Displaying phone numbers in this section

required: Professional photo of the gym owner/user for homepage section (owner-photo.dim_400x400.png)
